generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VehicleMotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for adaptive cruise control (ACC) implementation"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles steering adjustments for the autonomous vehicle's adaptive cruise control system, interfacing directly with the chassis"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR detects objects in the vehicle's proximity via point cloud generation for autonomous driving applications"
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera provides 3D environmental context for object tracking in the autonomous vehicle's surroundings"
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor capturing real-time ego vehicle speed data for ACC decision-making and control"
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring real-time steering angle data for adaptive cruise control implementation"
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:producedData "ROS2 PointCloud2"
]

instance DepthCameraPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:producedData "ROS2 PointCloud2"
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedData "ROS2 Float64"
]

instance VehicleSteeringData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedData "ROS2 Float64"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the autonomous vehicle used for real-time rendering in the virtual cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler
]

instance Environment3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the vehicle's operating environment for accurate path projection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering algorithm (DBSCAN) implemented in Python for real-time object detection from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking from clustered point clouds in real-time processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCPerformanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic adhering to ISO 15622 Performance Class I standards implemented in MATLAB/Simulink for validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series data of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for ACC monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks generated from processed LiDAR data via clustering and tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware facilitating real-time data processing between physical sensors and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and tracking (Kalman filter) for object detection from raw sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ensures interoperability between ROS2 nodes and cloud communication via unit conversions and message serialization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CloudCommunicationEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system storing time-series vehicle state data and object tracks for persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables VehicleStateTimeSeriesData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance ROS2VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom 3D visualization framework for real-time rendering of object tracks and driving paths in the virtual cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:enables Vehicle3DCADModel, Environment3DCADModel
]

instance ControlProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based processing for ACC control logic offloading from vehicle ECUs to NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCPerformanceModel
]

instance CloudCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication layer handling serialized message transmission between edge and cloud components"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D virtual cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, PathProjectionAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECUs to cloud-based processing (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) for high-fidelity simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, speed setting, and emergency braking via control panel UI with developer data collection capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction, TroubleshootingInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state parameters and detected object tracks for operational monitoring"
]

instance PathProjectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization based on current object tracks and vehicle state for safe autonomous operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of ACC metrics (speed adjustments, emergency braking) for data-driven tuning and maintenance optimization"
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of adaptive cruise control system and setting of desired operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Developer data collection for troubleshooting ACC failures or sensor drift during prototyping and validation"
]

// C17: Centralized Digital Twin Entity
instance CloudDigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single centralized Digital Twin Entity hosting all vehicle-specific functionalities with decentralized data storage components"
    base:isContainedIn SystemUnderStudy
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment Environment
]

instance Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CloudDigitalTwinEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Monolithic physical twin component hosting all vehicle-specific functionalities (LiDAR processing, actuation) in a single instance"
    base:isContainedIn SystemUnderStudy
    base:contains VehicleMotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE, ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataStorageFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized data storage feature (SQL database) for object tracks and ego vehicle state, not replicated in the Digital Twin Entity"
    base:isContainedIn SystemUnderStudy
    base:contains SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CloudDigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity, DataStorageFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin sends control commands to the physical twin via Wi-Fi (UDP-based) to execute ACC functions:
  - **ACC Controlling FE** computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (ISO 15622 compliance for Performance Class I ACC).
  - **Actuation FE** translates speed commands into motor voltage commands for the Vedder Speed Controller, adjusting vehicle speed.
  - **Control Panel FE** enables remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) via a 3D visualization interface. Synchronization ensures <100ms end-to-end latency for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time granularity** with:
  - **Data Collection**: 100ms frequency for ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and object tracks (updated via ROS2 topics).
  - **Control Loop**: ACC decision-making and actuation occur at **~100ms intervals** (aligned with 3GPP V2V latency requirements).
  - **Synchronization**: Clock accuracy of **≤100ms** across distributed nodes (ROS2 time synchronization mechanisms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts all vehicle-specific functionalities (e.g., LiDAR processing, actuation) and interfaces with sensors/actuators.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Aggregates data (object tracks, ego vehicle state) and computes ACC logic (ISO 15622 compliant).
  - **User Entity**: Provides two subcomponents:
    1. **3D Visualization FE**: Displays real-time ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths.
    2. **Control Panel FE**: Enables remote management (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (ROS2 ↔ Wi-Fi), ensuring message alignment and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system operates primarily during the **Design and Operational** lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation, simulation, and validation of ACC algorithms and system compliance with ISO 15622 standards.
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and optimization of the autonomous vehicle’s ACC system during active operation.
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: While retrofitting the physical twin involves manufacturing activities, the Digital Twin itself is not explicitly deployed during this stage; it is primarily used for post-manufacturing validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Real-time Data Accuracy**: LiDAR/camera data is processed via **DBSCAN clustering** and **Kalman filtering** to ensure object track precision.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency is capped at **100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185) to maintain deterministic control loops for ACC.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices are synchronized to **100 ms accuracy** (sufficient for distributed systems but not stricter standards like <1 ms).
  - **Validation**: ACC logic adheres to **ISO 15622** standards, ensuring safety and performance compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection employs:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **ROS2**: For intra-DT component communication (e.g., between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity).
    - **Wi-Fi (UDP)**: For inter-entity communication (e.g., between Digital Twin Entity and Control Panel FE).
  - **Network Architecture**: Distributed system with <100ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185 compliance).
  - **Synchronization**: ROS2 time synchronization ensures <100ms clock accuracy across distributed nodes."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across:
  - **Edge Layer**: **NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano** microcomputers on the vehicle for real-time processing (e.g., LiDAR tracking).
  - **Cloud/External Storage**: Vehicle state data is stored externally in a **SQL database** (e.g., cloud-hosted) for monitoring and reporting.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** enables modular deployment of FEs across hardware components, though edge/cloud layer distinction is not explicitly defined (implied by offloading ACC to the DT)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for digital twin development (adapted for automotive use).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements.
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (<100ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication.
  - **IEC 62541**: OPC UA for data translation (potential future adoption)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system prioritizes safety and security through:
  - **Functional Safety**: Compliance with ISO 15622 ensures ACC system reliability and adherence to performance standards.
  - **Latency and Synchronization**: Strict ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization requirements mitigate timing attacks and ensure deterministic behavior.
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands and ACC control commands are transmitted via secure Wi-Fi networks (UDP), reducing exposure to unauthorized access.
  - **Hardware Isolation**: The Physical Twin Entity runs on dedicated hardware (Jetson NX/Orin Nano) to isolate critical control logic from potential cyber threats."
]
